title: VidChain
tagline: Multimodal RAG framework for forensic video intelligence — 'LangChain for Videos'.
context: Forensic video analysis typically requires manual scrubbing through massive datasets, making it impossible to perform cross-video entity tracking or complex reasoning in real-time.
solution: Architected a local-first, edge-optimized RAG framework using the IRIS engine. Integrated multi-sensor fusion and GraphRAG to allow for complex natural language queries across distributed video nodes, enabling automated suspect tracking and event deduction.
codeSnippet:
# IRIS Engine: Cross-Modal Reasoning
def forensic_query(query, streams):
    context = engine.extract_multimodal_context(streams)
    graph = graph_rag.construct(context)
    result = graph.query(query, reasoning_mode='deductive')
    return result # Forensic evidence generated

title: Edge Tokenizer
tagline: Hybrid BPE/BBPE tokenizer for Hinglish with O(1) C++ optimization.
context: Standard BPE tokenizers often 'shatter' transliterated Hinglish text into meaningless individual characters, losing critical semantic roots during inference.
solution: Built a custom BPE tokenizer featuring a Hybrid Code-Mixed Router to eliminate token shattering. Optimized the lookup engine using a C++ Hash Map for O(1) efficiency, achieving sub-1ms latency on simulated edge hardware.

title: ICAIAC 2026
tagline: Official research platform for the International Conference on AI & Computing.
context: IIIT Manipur required a high-performance, professional digital hub to manage submissions, speaker details, and schedules for an international research conference.
solution: Developed a high-speed landing page using Next.js, focusing on performance and core web vitals. Implemented complex layouts and smooth motion using GSAP to reflect the cutting-edge nature of the AI/Computing theme.

title: E-Parchi
tagline: Full-stack medical RAG pipeline and hospital management system.
context: Digital prescription management is often fragmented. The goal was to build a system that allows doctors to manage patient logs while using AI to retrieve relevant medical history.
solution: Built a scalable medical log system with a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline. Used Firebase for real-time patient-doctor data synchronization and Next.js for a clean, intuitive clinical dashboard.

title: AgriHive
tagline: Multilingual AI farming assistant achieving 92% disease detection accuracy.
context: Farmers in rural India often lack access to immediate, localized agricultural advice, and internet connectivity is highly unreliable in remote areas.
solution: Engineered an offline-first mobile application using Flutter. Integrated a quantized TensorFlow Lite model for on-device inference, allowing for crop disease detection without network dependency.

title: AEGIS (CRPF)
tagline: Mission-critical secure log management system for the CRPF.
context: The CRPF required a secure digital alternative to manual log entries, necessitating strict data integrity and multi-level authorization for sensitive personnel data.
solution: Architected a high-integrity Firestore database with role-based access control (RBAC). Developed a customized management dashboard ensuring that sensitive logistical data is isolated, audited, and tamper-proof.

title: Drone Navigator
tagline: UAV navigation system utilizing SLAM and CNN-based obstacle avoidance.
context: Navigating UAVs in dynamic environments requires simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) alongside real-time computer vision for obstacle detection.
solution: Developed an autonomous navigation module in ROS integrated with SLAM for persistent mapping. Implemented OpenCV-based CNNs to facilitate real-time pathfinding and target detection in Gazebo simulations.

title: Walmart AI Bot
tagline: Semantic product search chatbot using LangChain and Gemini API.
context: Traditional keyword-based search fails to interpret complex user intent, leading to irrelevant product recommendations in e-commerce.
solution: Created a semantic search chatbot utilizing LangChain for document retrieval. Leveraged Gemini API for natural language understanding and Flask to manage the API gateway for real-time customer queries.
codeSnippet:
# LangChain Semantic Retrieval
retriever = vector_db.as_retriever(search_type='similarity')
qa_chain = RetrievalQA.from_chain_type(
    llm=gemini_model, 
    retriever=retriever
)
# 0.5s Semantic Lookup

title: PDF Table Parser
tagline: Automated extraction of unstructured PDF tables into structured datasets.
context: Manual data entry from PDF financial reports is time-consuming and error-prone, requiring a programmatic extraction method.
solution: Developed a Python utility using Pandas and PyPDF2 to identify and parse table structures from unstructured PDFs, exporting high-fidelity data into formatted Excel sheets automatically.
codeSnippet:
# PDF to Dataframe Extraction
import pandas as pd
def parse_pdf_table(file_path):
    tables = camelot.read_pdf(file_path)
    df = tables[0].df
    df.to_excel('output.xlsx', index=False)
